prevalence.source: Eurobarometer and WHO Europe tobacco surveillance
prevalence.trend: slowly decreasing overall; youth vaping rising in some countries

incidence.source: School health surveys and tobacco surveillance

burden.dalyPerCapita: high; major driver of CVD, COPD and cancer

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Self-reported tobacco use; dependence assessment with standardized tools

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: opportunistic screening and brief intervention in primary care
publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Tens of millions of current or former smokers
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; cessation success improves with counseling and pharmacotherapy

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care screening with brief interventions
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Behavioral counseling, nicotine replacement, bupropion or varenicline; quitline and digital support
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Youth uptake of vaping products and socioeconomic disparities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong tobacco control policies and cessation services in many countries
